name: sir-toolkit
description: SIR verified-recompose — decompile a package into a verified, self-contained re-implementation: a sighted decomposer reads the source once and emits a SIR + held-out oracle; N blind clean-room emitters reconstruct from the contract alone; two gates (held-out quorum + saturation differential) decide. The methodology behind the @rederive/* catalog.

plugins.name: sir
plugins.description: SIR verified-recompose toolkit (SIR Schema v0.4): the sir-verify, greenfield-quorum, and preflight skills plus the sir-decomposer / sir-reemitter(-cr) / sir-factory-runner agents. Drives the `sir-factory` CLI to build bundles and `rdv` to verify them (both shipped as dependencies, not bundled).
